project_type: Next.js 16 app with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, React 19
build_system: bun (bun.lock present, bun install + bun run build)
test_framework: None - no test files exist in the project
verification_instructions: Run 'bun run build' to verify the project compiles without errors
environment_constraints: No npm/node available directly, only bun via mise shims. Next.js build uses workers which emit warnings but still succeeds.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md says Next.js 16 may have breaking changes from training data - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ if it exists (currently does not).
key_patterns: - Image usage: TrackCard.tsx and AlbumCard.tsx use Next.js Image component with fill prop, sizes prop for responsive, and object-cover class. They use artworkUrl100 from the API response and upscale to 200x200. Fallback is an SVG placeholder. - API pattern: lib/itunes.ts exports async functions that call fetch with revalidate caching and filter results by wrapperType. - Remote image patterns for is*-ssl.mzstatic.com are already configured in next.config.ts. - Components are client components ('use client' directive) when they need interactivity.
directory_structure: Root: Next.js app router project. app/ contains page.tsx and components/. lib/ contains types.ts and itunes.ts. public/ for static assets. Standard Next.js 16 layout.
